subcodes.first_line: Praise, glorification, remembrance and splendor befit and are worthy of the Beloved of the world and the Goal of the nations, Who hath drawn forth the sword of retribution [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا و ذکر و بها محبوب عالم و مقصود امم را لایق و سزاست که سیف انتقام را
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
